about.title: A Reliable UK Distribution Partner
about.description: Prime Distro Ltd works with trusted suppliers and established brands to support retailers and trade customers across the United Kingdom. Our focus is reliable supply, responsive communication and long-term business relationships.

whyUs.title: Built Around Long-Term Trade Relationships
whyUs.description: We focus on reliability, communication and supply consistency to help trade customers grow with confidence.

faq.title: Common Trade Questions
faq.description: Answers to some of the most common questions from trade customers.

items.question: Who can open a trade account?
items.answer: Trade accounts are intended for retailers, wholesalers and legitimate business customers.

items.question: Which brands do you supply?
items.answer: We work with a range of established vape and nicotine pouch brands. Availability may vary.

items.question: Do you supply across the UK?
items.answer: Yes, we support trade customers throughout the United Kingdom.

items.question: How do I enquire about products?
items.answer: Use the trade enquiry form and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

contact.title: Open a Conversation
contact.description: Whether you're a retailer, wholesaler or trade buyer, we'd be happy to discuss how Prime Distro can support your business.

footer.description: Prime Distro Ltd is a UK-based wholesale distributor supporting trade customers with reliable supply, responsive communication and trusted brand access.
footer.compliance: For trade customers only. Age-restricted products must be sold responsibly and in line with UK regulations.
